HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists productos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists repuestos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists servicios cascade Hibernate: create table productos (boleta_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, precio float(53) not null, stock integer not null check ((stock>=0)), codigo_barras varchar(100) not null, nombre_producto varchar(200) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table repuestos (boleta_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, precio float(53) not null, stock_repuesto integer not null check ((stock_repuesto>=0)), codigo_barras varchar(100) not null, nombre_repuesto varchar(200) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table servicios (boleta_id integer, id integer generated by default as identity, valor_del_servicio float(53) not null, nombre_servicio varchar(200) not null, desc_servicio varchar(400) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-06-29T02:29:14.644-04:00 INFO 16288 --- [ms] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for
